title: Xbox is testing ad-supported game streaming. Amazon is folding Luna into Prime Video. Both admit cloud gaming has not worked yet.
summary: Xbox is testing ad-supported cloud game streaming. Xbox will test ad-supported game streaming, letting users in its Insider Programme stream games they already own for free with a one-hour session limit and advertising.
caption: output/2026-07-23/xbox-is-testing-ad-supported-game-streaming-amazon-is-folding-luna-int.txt
